appraisal.description: A white porcelain teacup that stays unnaturally cold even under bright shop lamps.

clues.result: Hairline cracks form a faint spiral around the bowl.
A hidden ring-shaped mark glows blue near the rim.
The cup reads far below room temperature.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If sold, the buyer returns with frostbite and the shop loses reputation.

generation.concept_prompt: A cracked porcelain teacup for a first-person cursed antique shop game, dark tea stain, faint hairline fractures, readable silhouette, no text.
generation.model_prompt: A cursed porcelain teacup game prop, cracked white ceramic, dark stain, asymmetrical worn details, game-ready PBR texture, no text, no logo.
